news.t: PGIM Investments Launches Growth, Value and Multi-Asset ETFs

holdings.infoBox: PJFG is an equity ETF with a total of 38 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 11.21%, Alphabet at 8.99%, Apple at 8.02%, Amazon.com at 7.84%, and Microsoft at 4.86%.

overview.description: The PGIM Jennison Focused Growth ETF (PJFG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides exposure to a narrow basket of growth stocks from all over the world. PJFG was launched on Dec 12, 2022 and is issued by PGIM.

data.title: 4 Promising Active ETFs
data.text: These funds are flying under investors' radar.

data.title: PGIM Investments Launches Growth, Value and Multi-Asset ETFs
data.text: NEWARK, N.J.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--PGIM Investments has launched three actively managed ETFs — the PGIM Jennison Focused Growth ETF (PJFG), the PGIM Jennison Focused Value ETF (PJFV) and the PGIM Portfo...
